revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q61005365)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:"
Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|"
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]]"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[法政大学第二中学校・高等学校|法政大学第二高等学校]]出身の人物に関するカテゴリ。 {{CategoryTOC}}
{{デフォルトソート:ほうせいたいかくたいに}} ==Local Content== {{CategoryTOC}} {{citation needed|ほうせいたいかくたいに}} {{translated page|ja|Category:法政大学第二高等学校出身の人物|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:法政大学第二高等学校出身の人物|version=90973921}} [[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]][[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:Category:法政大学第二高等学校出身の人物]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Saeki Ariyoshi]] [[Category:Categories in Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|Q61005365}} [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories to be renamed]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:High school alumni from Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:Hosei University Corporation]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Categories]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[法政大学第二中学校・高等学校|法政大学第二高等学校]]出身の人物に関するカテゴリ。 {{CategoryTOC}}
{{デフォルトソート:ほうせいたいかくたいに}} ==Local Content== {{CategoryTOC}} {{citation needed|ほうせいたいかくたいに}} {{translated page|ja|Category:法政大学第二高等学校出身の人物|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:法政大学第二高等学校出身の人物|version=90973921}} [[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]][[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:Category:法政大学第二高等学校出身の人物]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Saeki Ariyoshi]] [[Category:Categories in Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|Q61005365}} [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories to be renamed]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:High school alumni from Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:Hosei University Corporation]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Categories]] [[Category:Categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "[[Ja:" to "[[ja:"
Text replacement - "ategories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q61005365)
Text replacement - "{{Wikidata link|" to "{{wikidata link|"
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Cqq]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{CategoryTOC}}
{{デフォルトソート:ほうせいたいかくたいに}}

{{translated page|ja|Category:法政大学第二高等学校出身の人物|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}}
